competitor_changes: Integrated inventory management for retail POS
Implemented automated recipe scaling for food manufacturers
current_tool_status: No time-tracking built in — staff use a separate tool (ChronoLog) at £95/mo
Client portal view is read-only; clients cannot comment or approve deliverables in-app
Gantt chart view requires manual refresh — does not auto-update on dependency changes
No resource capacity planning — managers track utilisation in spreadsheets
Slack integration was deprecated in TaskBridge v4.1; now requires Zapier workaround
notes: Migration from TaskBridge would mean losing dedicated PM depth
